description: Built and shipped production features for a multi-stack web application serving 200+ daily active users.
highlights: Built 5+ RESTful APIs using Express.js with JWT authentication and validation middleware, reducing invalid request errors by 40%
Developed full-stack features using MERN stack with hybrid MongoDB/MySQL integration, serving 200+ daily active users
Implemented reusable React.js component library with Redux state management, cutting UI development time by 25%
Optimized database queries and refactored legacy Node.js services, improving overall application response time by 30%
Collaborated in an Agile team of 6; participated in daily stand-ups, sprint planning, and peer code reviews on GitHub
Deployed applications using Docker and CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions on cloud infrastructure
